note: Single source of truth for the AI tools directory (R35). Each tool: url, dom (favicon domain), name, desc, cat (llm|code|image|data|productivity), tag, access (free|both|paid), added, optional aff (full affiliate URL — when set, links use it instead of url + ?ref=promptai).

tools.name: Claude (Anthropic)
tools.desc: Advanced reasoning, coding, analysis and long-context understanding.

tools.name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
tools.desc: Multimodal assistant for text, images, voice and real-time tasks.

tools.name: Gemini (Google)
tools.desc: Google's multimodal model with deep Workspace and search integration.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.desc: Answer engine that cites live sources for grounded research.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.desc: AI pair programmer integrated into VS Code, JetBrains and more.

tools.name: Cursor IDE
tools.desc: AI-native code editor built on VS Code with deep Claude/GPT integration.

tools.name: Replit Agent
tools.desc: Cloud IDE that builds and deploys full apps from a prompt.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.desc: State-of-the-art text-to-image generation with photorealistic quality.

tools.name: DALL·E 3
tools.desc: OpenAI's image model with precise text rendering inside images.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion
tools.desc: Open-weights image generation you can run and fine-tune locally.

tools.name: Hugging Face
tools.desc: The hub for open models, datasets and ML demos.

tools.name: Databricks + DBRX
tools.desc: Enterprise AI/ML platform with integrated LLM and data pipelines.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.desc: AI-enhanced workspace for notes, docs, wikis and project management.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.desc: Generate polished decks, docs and sites from a single prompt.

tools.name: Otter.ai
tools.desc: Live meeting transcription, summaries and action items.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.desc: Lifelike AI voice generation, dubbing and text-to-speech.
